tasks.label: Diagnose reg cat
tasks.command:
source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import pdfplumber, re
CAT_RE = re.compile(r'(\\d{2}\\s+[A-Z]{2}\\s+\\d{3})', re.IGNORECASE)
with pdfplumber.open('registrations.pdf') as pdf:
    for i, page in enumerate(pdf.pages[1:6], start=2):
        text = page.extract_text() or ''
        lines = text.splitlines()
        for line in lines:
            if CAT_RE.search(line):
                print(repr(line[:120]))
"

tasks.label: Check separator
tasks.command:
source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import pdfplumber, re
SEP = '\uf007'
with pdfplumber.open('registrations.pdf') as pdf:
    for i, page in enumerate(pdf.pages[1:4], start=2):
        text = page.extract_text() or ''
        for line in text.splitlines():
            if SEP in line:
                parts = line.split(SEP, 1)
                print('BEFORE:', repr(parts[0].strip()[:80]))
                print('AFTER :', repr(parts[1].strip()[:60]))
                print()
" 2>&1 | head -80

tasks.label: Write reg parser
tasks.command:
cat > /Users/taajemaa/dev/private/sportdata-scanner/utils/parse_registrations.py << 'ENDOFFILE'
"""
parse_registrations.py

Parses the sportdata registrations PDF (printed webpage).

Key discovery: pdfplumber renders the person-icon (U+F007) between
the fighter name and the category code on each line.

Line format:
  CLUB_INFO FIGHTER_NAME \uf007 CATEGORY_CODE

Example lines:
  'GRAZ(ASKOEKCG) MAIER ALEXANDER \uf007 02 LC 135 S M -94 KG'
  'HUETTER(ASKOEKH), AUSTRIA HAAS LENA \uf007 01 PF 045 OC F -42 KG'
  'SEKTION KICKBOXEN(ATSVLBSK), FEICHTINGER MIA SOPHIE \uf007 01 PF 048 OC F -55 KG'
"""

import re
import pdfplumber

# The person-icon character that separates name from category in the PDF
_SEP = '\uf007'

# Country abbreviation in parentheses, e.g. (SUI) (AUT) (GER)
_COUNTRY_ABBR_RE = re.compile(r'\(([A-Z]{2,3})\)')

# Skip lines that are page metadata
_SKIP_RE = re.compile(
    r'https?://|SET-ONLINE|UBERSICHT|NENNUNGEN GESAMT|TOTAL ATHLETES'
    r'|^TEAM\s|Suchen:|^\s*\d+/\d+\s*$',
    re.IGNORECASE,
)

SWISS_ABBREVS = {'SUI'}
SWISS_NAMES   = {'switzerland', 'schweiz', 'suisse', 'svizzera'}


def extract_fighters(pdf_path: str) -> list[dict]:
    """Return ALL fighters from the registrations PDF."""
    lines = _extract_lines(pdf_path)
    return _parse_lines(lines, swiss_only=False)


def get_swiss_fighters(pdf_path: str) -> list[dict]:
    """Return Swiss fighters only, deduplicated by (name, category_code)."""
    lines = _extract_lines(pdf_path)
    fighters = _parse_lines(lines, swiss_only=True)
    seen = set()
    unique = []
    for f in fighters:
        key = (f['name'].lower(), f['category_code'].lower())
        if key not in seen:
            seen.add(key)
            unique.append(f)
    return unique


def _extract_lines(pdf_path: str) -> list[str]:
    lines = []
    with pdfplumber.open(pdf_path) as pdf:
        for page in pdf.pages:
            text = page.extract_text() or ''
            lines.extend(text.splitlines())
    return lines


def _parse_lines(lines: list[str], swiss_only: bool) -> list[dict]:
    fighters = []
    n = len(lines)

    for i, raw_line in enumerate(lines):
        if _SEP not in raw_line:
            continue
        line = raw_line.strip()
        if _SKIP_RE.search(line):
            continue

        parts = line.split(_SEP, 1)
        before        = parts[0].strip()   # club prefix + fighter name
        category_raw  = parts[1].strip()   # category code (uppercase)

        if not category_raw:
            continue

        # --- extract country from the "before" part ---
        country = _country_from_text(before)

        # --- if no country on this line, check surrounding lines ---
        if not country:
            window_start = max(0, i - 2)
            window_end   = min(n, i + 3)
            for ctx_line in lines[window_start:window_end]:
                country = _country_from_text(ctx_line)
                if country:
                    break

        if swiss_only and country not in SWISS_ABBREVS:
            continue

        # --- extract name: rightmost uppercase words before the icon ---
        name = _extract_name(before)
        if not name:
            continue

        # --- clean up club ---
        club = _extract_club(before, name)

        # Normalise category code to lowercase to match schedule codes
        category_code = category_raw.strip().rstrip('.')

        fighters.append({
            'name':          name,
            'category_code': category_code,
            'category':      category_code,     # alias used by matcher
            'country':       country,
            'club':          club,
        })

    return fighters


_ALL_CAPS_WORD_RE = re.compile(r"^[A-ZÄÖÜ][A-ZÄÖÜ\-\']+$")


def _extract_name(before: str) -> str:
    """
    Name = rightmost run of ALL-CAPS words in the "before" string.
    Stops when it hits a word that isn't all-caps (club text, country name).
    """
    # Remove content in parentheses (club abbreviations)
    cleaned = re.sub(r'\([^)]*\)', ' ', before).strip()
    tokens = cleaned.split()
    name_tokens = []
    for tok in reversed(tokens):
        tok_clean = tok.rstrip(',-')
        if _ALL_CAPS_WORD_RE.match(tok_clean) and len(tok_clean) > 1:
            # Skip known country names that would appear here
            if tok_clean.lower() not in SWISS_NAMES and tok_clean not in {
                'AUSTRIA', 'GERMANY', 'FRANCE', 'ITALY', 'ITALIA',
                'HUNGARY', 'SLOVAKIA', 'CZECH', 'POLAND', 'SPAIN',
                'CROATIA', 'SERBIA', 'ROMANIA', 'BULGARIA', 'UKRAINE',
            }:
                name_tokens.insert(0, tok_clean)
            else:
                break
        else:
            break
    return ' '.join(name_tokens)


def _country_from_text(text: str) -> str:
    """Return 3-letter country abbreviation if found in text, else empty string."""
    m = _COUNTRY_ABBR_RE.search(text)
    if m:
        return m.group(1).upper()
    text_lower = text.lower()
    for name in SWISS_NAMES:
        if name in text_lower:
            return 'SUI'
    return ''


def _extract_club(before: str, name: str) -> str:
    """Extract club = everything before the name in the before string."""
    idx = before.rfind(name)
    if idx > 0:
        club = before[:idx].strip().strip(',').strip()
        # Remove inline country name from club string
        club = re.sub(
            r'\b(?:SWITZERLAND|SCHWEIZ|SUISSE|SVIZZERA|AUSTRIA|GERMANY'
            r'|FRANCE|ITALY|ITALIA|HUNGARY)\b',
            '', club, flags=re.IGNORECASE
        ).strip().strip(',').strip()
        return club
    return ''
ENDOFFILE
echo 'written'

tasks.label: Test draws matching
tasks.command:
source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
from utils.parse_draws import extract_draws, pool_for_fighter
from utils.parse_registrations import get_swiss_fighters
d = extract_draws('draws.pdf')
print(f'Total categories in draws: {len(d)}')
# Show only multi-pool categories
multi = {k:v for k,v in d.items() if len(set(v.values())) > 1}
print(f'Multi-pool categories: {len(multi)}')
for cat, fighters in list(multi.items())[:3]:
    print(f'  {cat}: pools {set(fighters.values())}')
    for name, pool in list(fighters.items())[:4]: print(f'    pool {pool}: {name}')
print()
# Test matching against real Swiss fighters
swiss = get_swiss_fighters('registrations.pdf')
print(f'Testing pool lookup for {len(swiss)} Swiss fighters:')
found = not_found = 0
for f in swiss:
    p = pool_for_fighter(d, f['category_code'], f['name'])
    if p: found += 1; print(f'  FOUND pool {p}: {f[\"name\"]} in {f[\"category_code\"]}')
    else: not_found += 1
print(f'Found: {found}, Not found: {not_found}')
"

tasks.label: Swiss pool lookup
tasks.command: source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "from utils.parse_draws import extract_draws,pool_for_fighter; from utils.parse_registrations import get_swiss_fighters; d=extract_draws('draws.pdf'); swiss=get_swiss_fighters('registrations.pdf'); hits=[(f['name'],f['category_code'],pool_for_fighter(d,f['category_code'],f['name'])) for f in swiss]; found=[x for x in hits if x[2]]; missing=[x for x in hits if not x[2]]; print(f'Found: {len(found)}  Missing: {len(missing)}'); [print(f'  Pool {p}: {n} | {c}') for n,c,p in found[:30]]"

tasks.label: Pool lookup v2
tasks.command:
source .venv/bin/activate && python3 << 'EOF'
from utils.parse_draws import extract_draws, pool_for_fighter
from utils.parse_registrations import get_swiss_fighters
d = extract_draws('draws.pdf')
swiss = get_swiss_fighters('registrations.pdf')
hits = [(f['name'], f['category_code'], pool_for_fighter(d, f['category_code'], f['name'])) for f in swiss]
found = [x for x in hits if x[2]]
missing = [x for x in hits if not x[2]]
print(f'Found: {len(found)}  Missing: {len(missing)}')
for n,c,p in found[:30]:
    print(f'  Pool {p}: {n} | {c}')
print('--- Missing ---')
for n,c,_ in missing[:10]:
    print(f'  {n} | {c}')
EOF
